input: Imagine a self-contained, hypothetical world with only the following conditions, and without any unmentioned factors or causal relationships: Kwox has a direct effect on muvy and swoq. Swoq has a direct effect on kwoz. Muvy has a direct effect on kwoz. For those who are not kwox, the probability of kwoz is 34%. For those who are kwox, the probability of kwoz is 55%. Will kwox increase the chance of kwoz?
